offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously, inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance causes project delays. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual logs and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance leads to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar issues
DM outreach to 20-50 contractors with demo video
Participate in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance logs and simple reporting dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
